title: Iran’s Regime May Survive, but the Middle East Will Be Changed
summary_full: A badly weakened Iran will no longer intimidate or threaten its neighbors in the same way. The regional impact could be comparable to the collapse of the Soviet Union.
summary_public: A badly weakened Iran will no longer intimidate or threaten its neighbors in the same way. The regional impact could be comparable to the collapse of the Soviet Union.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: A badly weakened Iran will no longer intimidate or threaten its neighbors
